title: 尾款、发货前付款和付款提醒
theme: 从 balance payment / payment reminder / release goods 开始
goals: 能礼貌提醒客户安排尾款，而不是生硬催款
能说明发货前需要付款确认，并守住付款边界
能处理客户要求先发货后付款或拖延付款的场景

review.title: Day 21 复习
items: 昨天练了 payment receipt、bank review、finance confirmation、remittance slip、received amount 和 bank fee。
今天继续财务沟通：货物已完成或准备出货，但客户尾款还没有安排。
催尾款时要礼貌、清楚、有依据：根据付款条款，balance payment 需要在 shipment release 前完成。

preview.scenario: 货物已经通过出货前确认，但客户还没付尾款，或者要求先发货后付款。你需要提醒客户付款、说明公司付款条款，并在客户付款后推进放行出货。
needToKnow: balance payment 是尾款，不等于简单的 balance 余额。
payment reminder 要礼貌，避免让客户感觉被催得不舒服。
release goods 表示放货，通常要在付款确认后才能安排。

vocabulary.usage: 用于订单发货前客户需要支付的剩余款项。
vocabulary.example: Please arrange the balance payment before shipment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于礼貌提醒客户付款。
vocabulary.example: This is a friendly payment reminder for the balance payment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明付款、确认或检查需要在出货前完成。
vocabulary.example: The balance payment should be completed before shipment.

vocabulary.meaning: 账期 / 信用付款条件
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求先发货后付款或延后付款时说明公司是否支持账期。
vocabulary.example: We are sorry, but we cannot offer a credit term for this order.

vocabulary.usage: 用于付款确认后安排仓库或货代提货。
vocabulary.example: We can release goods after the balance payment is confirmed.

vocabulary.usage: 用于提醒客户在某个日期前安排付款，以免影响出货。
vocabulary.example: Please arrange payment before the payment deadline.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明付款已经超过约定时间。
vocabulary.example: The payment is overdue according to the agreed terms.

vocabulary.meaning: 结清付款 / 付清款项
vocabulary.usage: 用于正式说明完成付款后才能推进下一步。
vocabulary.example: Please settle payment so we can arrange shipment.

sentences.label: 礼貌提醒尾款
sentences.natural: Please arrange the balance payment before shipment.
sentences.business: This is a friendly payment reminder. Please arrange the balance payment before shipment so we can release the goods on time.

sentences.label: 说明发货前付款
sentences.natural: The balance payment should be completed before shipment.
sentences.business: According to our payment terms, the balance payment should be completed before shipment release.

sentences.label: 拒绝先发货后付款
sentences.natural: We are sorry, but we cannot release goods before payment confirmation.
sentences.business: We are sorry, but we cannot offer a credit term for this order, so we need payment confirmation before we release goods.

sentences.label: 提醒付款截止
sentences.business: To avoid affecting the shipment schedule, please arrange payment before the payment deadline this Friday.

sentences.label: 付款后安排出货
sentences.natural: After payment is confirmed, we will arrange shipment.
sentences.business: Once the balance payment is confirmed by our finance team, we will arrange shipment release immediately.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气太硬，容易让客户反感；需要用 friendly reminder 和发货安排衔接。
chatAnalysis.better: Please arrange the balance payment before shipment.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: This is a friendly payment reminder. Please arrange the balance payment before shipment so we can release the goods on time.

chatAnalysis.problem: 虽然意思准确，但太直接；商务表达要说明付款条款。
chatAnalysis.better: We cannot release goods before payment confirmation.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: According to our payment terms, we need payment confirmation before we release goods.

chatAnalysis.problem: 容易显得指责客户，可以改成客观说明付款已超过约定时间。
chatAnalysis.better: The payment is overdue according to the agreed terms.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The payment is overdue according to the agreed terms, so please help arrange the balance payment as soon as possible.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：礼貌提醒尾款

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The goods are ready for shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, when can you ship?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please arrange the balance payment before shipment, then we can release the goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will arrange it with our finance team.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户要求先发货后付款

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you ship first? We will pay the balance next week.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We are sorry, but we cannot offer a credit term for this order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need the goods urgently.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. Once the balance payment is confirmed, we will arrange shipment release immediately.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：尾款逾期影响出货

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: This is a friendly payment reminder for the balance payment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We are still waiting for internal approval.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. To avoid affecting the shipment schedule, please arrange payment before the payment deadline this Friday.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will push our finance team.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：货物已好，客户拖尾款并要求先发货

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Hi, the goods have passed the final check and are ready for shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Great. Please arrange shipment as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Before shipment release, we still need the balance payment confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you ship first? We will pay the balance next week.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your request, but according to our payment terms, the balance payment should be completed before shipment release.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We have worked together before. Can you make an exception?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you for your trust. However, we cannot offer a credit term for this order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our finance team is slow this week.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. This is a friendly payment reminder, so you can plan the payment before shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will the goods be held if payment is not made this week?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, the goods will stay in our warehouse until the balance payment is confirmed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you at least book the shipment first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can prepare the shipment documents and coordinate with the warehouse, but we can release goods only after payment confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When is the payment deadline?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: To avoid affecting the shipment schedule, please arrange payment before the payment deadline this Friday.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If we pay on Friday, can you ship immediately?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Once the balance payment is confirmed by our finance team, we will arrange shipment release immediately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What if the bank transfer takes one or two days?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If the payment is under bank review, we will wait for finance confirmation before release goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can a payment receipt help you release the goods earlier?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The payment receipt can help us check the transfer, but shipment release still needs finance confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Understood. I will ask our finance team to settle payment as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please send us the payment receipt after the balance payment is arranged.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will update you once payment is done.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Once we receive finance confirmation, we will release goods and update you immediately.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请在发货前安排尾款。
exercises.answer: Please arrange the balance payment before shipment.
acceptable: please arrange the balance payment before shipment
please arrange balance payment before shipment
exercises.hint: balance payment 是尾款，before shipment 是发货前。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更商务：pay balance now
exercises.answer: This is a friendly payment reminder. Please arrange the balance payment before shipment.
acceptable: this is a friendly payment reminder please arrange the balance payment before shipment
please arrange the balance payment before shipment
exercises.hint: 用 friendly payment reminder 软化语气。

exercises.prompt: 填空：We can ____ goods after the balance payment is confirmed.
客户要求先发货后付款，哪个回复更合适？
options: We are sorry, but we cannot offer a credit term for this order.
exercises.answer: We are sorry, but we cannot offer a credit term for this order.
acceptable: we are sorry but we cannot offer a credit term for this order

exercises.prompt: 中译英：为了避免影响出货排期，请在本周五付款截止前安排付款。
exercises.answer: To avoid affecting the shipment schedule, please arrange payment before the payment deadline this Friday.
acceptable: to avoid affecting the shipment schedule please arrange payment before the payment deadline this friday
to avoid affecting shipment schedule please arrange payment before the payment deadline this friday
exercises.hint: payment deadline 是付款截止时间。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you ship first? We will pay next week. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: I understand your request, but according to our payment terms, the balance payment should be completed before shipment release.
acceptable: i understand your request but according to our payment terms the balance payment should be completed before shipment release
according to our payment terms the balance payment should be completed before shipment release
exercises.hint: 先理解客户，再说明付款条款。

homework: 把 balance payment、payment reminder、before shipment、credit term、release goods、payment deadline、overdue payment、settle payment 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 friendly payment reminder 和 shipment release。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：货物已好，客户要先发货后付款，你要礼貌拒绝账期，并提醒尾款确认后立即放货。
tomorrow: Day 23 会练发票、装箱单和清关文件。
